Restriction: Must be in ENGR: PhD Only-Bioengineering (Doctoral) program.

BIOE606 BIOE Graduate Studies II (1 Credit)

Second semester continued acclimation to the bioengineering graduate program. Students gain exposure to departmental research through lab rotation and to current research in the field through seminar. Restriction: Must be in ENGR: PhD Only-Bioengineering (Doctoral) program.
